About Me

Software Engineer & Project Management Consultant having experience of 7+ years. Started with technical positions and excel in the Project management domain followed by a Master’s Degree in Project Management.
Worked in both Waterfall & AGILE environments. Drove and completed many projects such as; mobile apps and
custom softwares making impact in business.

We value our clients at their every single step towards their vision and for this we give our utmost expertise in surviving in industry. Our working tactics will not leave any gaps in your journey to your dream as we follow the step by step strategies.

App Development

Custom Mobile App Design and Development for all types of industries is one of our strengths. We help businesses to get connected with their customers and teams using mobile apps. We have experience in delivering in multiple industries including Healthcare, fintech, and manufacturing.

Services

Custom Softwere Development

We offer a variety of technical software development services across multiple business domains to meet your specific business goals. Our dedicated team of architects and consultants can provide due diligence, auditing, and solution design. Strong and effective documentation enables us to maintain, retain and transfer the knowledge base for each project. Enorness’ robust processes and improvements in skill set allow us to attract and retain the top talent from the market and ensure high quality of project execution.

Ecommerce Solutions

Ecommerce solutions cover all technology-related requirements of an e-commerce business. Being an e-commerce solution provider, Enorness offers a skill set of savvy business consultants who help you to make the right choices to achieve your business goals. We provide pre-built and trusted e-commerce solutions with automation of processing orders, generating notifications, generating reports, etc. which make it a business tool.

Data Analytics

Our focus at Enorness is to attract businesses who are more data driven and wants to take decisions based on data. We retain the best minds in Data Analytics and Business Intelligence. We covers full service data consulting offerings including Strategy, Execution, and Enablement (SEE). With deep expertise in healthcare, financial services, manufacturing, and logistics, we are equipped enough to handle any project and offer personal tailored services.

Dashboards

Get Rid of Data-visualization challenges, Data is the most important repository for any business whether that data is coming from an app or any IoT device. Lengthy tables and applying analysis scripts are time-consuming. Data can always be converted into an attractive and meaningful dashboard, that’s what makes it more user-friendly. We at Enorness have the capabilities to build custom dashboards depicting the right information and exactly what is needed for your business growth.

Mobile Application Development

Custom Mobile App Design and Development for all types of industries is one of our strengths. We help businesses to get connected with their customers and teams using mobile apps. We have experience in delivering in multiple industries including Healthcare, fintech, and manufacturing. 

Web Development

We value our clients at their every single step towards their vision and for this we give our utmost expertise in surviving in industry. Our working tactics will not leave any gaps in your journey to your dream as we follow the step by step strategies.

Digital Marketing

We are providing marketing services to mid-size businesses to completely transform into massive corporations via marketing their services and products. We all are already aware of social media has made an enormous impact to the world. Whether it is about a product, service, or store, taking your brand to next level is our success.

Consulting

With our best tech minds, We offer IT consulting services that will enable you to improve your software architecture, create a tech-driven digital strategy, and improve operations cost by optimising your digital infrastructure. Our team of software engineers and consultants will polish your digital transformation journey through effective planning and smooth execution of the IT strategy.
